mapper.insert: insert into users values(#{id}, #{pw}, users_seq.nextval, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{oriname}, #{ssn_hash}, #{ssn_enc}, #{ssn_masked}, #{zonecode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', TO_TIMESTAMP(#{hire_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), null, #{dept_seq}, #{rank_seq}, sysdate, null, #{sysname})
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.rank_name from users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN "RANK" r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq WHERE u.id = #{id}

select u.id as id, u.users_seq as users_seq, u.name as name, u.sysname as sysname, d.dept_seq as dept_seq, d.dept_name as dept_name, d.parent_dept_seq as parent_dept_seq, d.auth_group as auth_group, r.rank_name rank_name, u.role as role from users u left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where id = #{loginId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_at = sysdate, resign_date = sysdate null
WHERE users_seq = #{users_seq}

update users set name = #{name}, dept_seq = NVL(#{dept_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, dept_seq), rank_seq = NVL(#{rank_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, rank_seq), role = #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_at = sysdate where users_seq = #{users_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.users_seq, u.name, u.role, u.created_at, u.update_at, u.sysname, d.dept_seq AS dept_seq, d.dept_name AS dept_name, d.parent_dept_seq AS parent_dept_seq, d.auth_group AS auth_group, r.rank_name AS rank_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN rank r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY u.rank_seq

SELECT u.users_seq, u.name, u.id, u.phone, u.email, u.zonecode, u.address1, u.address2, u.hire_date, d.dept_seq, d.dept_name, r.rank_seq, r.rank_name, s.sysname AS stamp_sysname, s.oriname AS stamp_oriname, s.stamp_seq FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN rank r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq LEFT JOIN user_stamp s ON u.id = s.users_id WHERE u.id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_stamp (stamp_seq, users_id, sysname, oriname, created_at) VALUES (STAMP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{sysname}, #{oriname}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_stamp SET sysname = #{sysname}, oriname = #{oriname}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE users_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_stamp WHERE users_id = #{id}
select count(*) from users where name = #{name} and email = #{email}
select count(*) from users where id = #{id} and name = #{name} and email = #{email}
select id from users where email = #{email}
mapper.update: update users set pw = #{pw} where email = #{email}
mapper.select: select rank_seq from users where id = #{loginId}
